allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.main import app; from indexer.pipeline import index_all, index_file; from indexer.watcher import start_watcher, stop_worker; from app.services.fts import get_all_documents_mtimes; print\('imports OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; con=sqlite3.connect\(':memory:'\); con.execute\(\\"CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t USING fts5\(x, tokenize='trigram'\)\\"\); print\('trigram OK, sqlite=', sqlite3.sqlite_version\)")
Bash(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.services import fts; from app.routes import search; from app.services import qdrant_store; print\('imports OK'\)")
PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.services import fts; from app.routes import search; from app.services import qdrant_store; print\('imports OK'\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process python,qdrant -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{n='MemMB';e={[int]\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
